---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement or experiment
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What would you like to improve?

Describe the idea and the problem it would solve.

## Who would it help?

Explain the visitor, member, moderator, or contributor use case.

## What would success look like?

List the observable result without prescribing unnecessary implementation details.

## Alternatives or references

Share privacy-safe examples or references if they clarify the idea. Distinguish inspiration from code you are proposing to copy.

Do not include credentials, session links, private email addresses, or personal user data.
